news.headline: iQIYI priced US$350 million upsized offering of 4.625% convertible senior notes due 2030, concurrent with $300 million repurchases.
news.summary: In Beijing on February 20, 2025, iQIYI, Inc. (Nasdaq: IQ), a prominent provider of online entertainment video services in China, disclosed the pricing details of its increased offering, known as the Notes Offering. This offering consists of US$350 million in aggregate principal amount of 4.625% convertible senior notes due 2030. The Notes will carry an interest rate of 4.625% annually, with payments made quarterly in arrears on March 15, June 15, September 15, and December 15 of each year, commencing from June 15, 2025. Unless repurchased, redeemed, or converted as per the terms outlined, the Notes are set to mature on March 15, 2030.

news.headline: Xerox declares dividend: $0.125/share on Common Stock, $20.00/share on Preferred Stock. Payable in April 2025.
news.summary: Norwalk, Connecticut - Xerox Holdings Corporation (NASDAQ: XRX) revealed that its board of directors has approved a quarterly dividend of $0.125 per share on Xerox Holdings Corporation Common Stock. This dividend will be paid on April 30, 2025, to shareholders who are on record as of March 31, 2025. Additionally, the board has announced a quarterly dividend of $20.00 per share on the outstanding Xerox Holdings Series A Convertible Perpetual Preferred Stock. This dividend will be paid on April 1, 2025.

news.headline: Report predicts growth in medical device market (2025-2030) driven by aging populations in developing countries. Wearable devices also accelerate globally. - ResearchAndMarkets.com
news.summary: A new report titled "Medical Device Market, 2025-2030" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report delves into the market for traditional and connected medical devices, analyzing factors such as device type, function, durability, therapeutic segment, risk classification, manufacture method, and more. Market sizing and segmentation are provided for wearable, implanted, and portable medical devices, encompassing a wide range of factors. This comprehensive analysis covers various regions and offers insights into the industry up to 2030.

news.headline: PulteGroup tests robotic-assisted construction at TerraWalk in Babcock Ranch, a solar-powered town. Partnered with FBR.
news.summary: In Atlanta, PulteGroup, a prominent homebuilder listed on NYSE as PHM, conducted a successful trial of robotic-assisted construction in the TerraWalk community at Babcock Ranch. This community is located in America's inaugural solar-powered town. The initiative showcases PulteGroup's commitment to pushing boundaries in homebuilding by incorporating cutting-edge technology. Partnering with FBR, an Australia-based company, the test reflects PulteGroup's dedication to innovation in the industry.

news.headline: TKM Grupp AS annual shareholders' meeting on 17th March 2025 at Tallinn, Viking Motors dealership, Tammsaare tee 51.
news.summary: TKM Grupp AS, with registry code 10223439 and headquartered at Kaubamaja 1, 10143 Tallinn, has scheduled its annual general meeting of shareholders for March 17, 2025, at 12 p.m. The meeting will be held in Tallinn at the Viking Motors dealership located at Tammsaare tee 51.

news.headline: Harvest Care Medical in West Virginia receives $4 million refinance deal to support growth in cannabis market.
news.summary: A prominent cannabis company in West Virginia, Harvest Care Medical, has recently finalized a refinancing agreement worth $4 million. This significant financial transaction is designed to support the company's efforts to grow its operations and enhance financial efficiency by lowering monthly debt servicing costs. Kevin Gibbs, the founder and board member of Harvest Care Medical, emphasized that this refinancing showcases their dedication to fostering expansion while upholding responsible financial practices.

news.headline: Xiao-I Corp. launches tAIkbox 1, transforming automated calls for better customer service in the U.S. trailblazer in AI.
news.summary: Today in Rockville, Maryland, Xiao-I Corporation (NASDAQ: AIXI), a leading company in artificial intelligence, introduced tAIkbox 1 to the U.S. market. This innovative AI-powered device is expected to revolutionize customer service. Unlike traditional automated systems, tAIkbox 1 aims to provide a more seamless and user-friendly experience. This launch signifies Xiao-I Corporation's commitment to enhancing customer service with cutting-edge technology.

news.headline: CredCore secures $16M in Series A funding to innovate enterprise debt investment with AI. Led by Avataar Ventures.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, CredCore, a vertical-AI firm revolutionizing debt capital markets for lenders and borrowers, disclosed a $16 million investment in Series A. The funding round was spearheaded by Avataar Ventures, along with contributions from Inspired Capital, Fitch Group, and BellTower Partners.

news.headline: Copado debuts 3 AI-Powered DevOps apps on Slack Marketplace, aiming to streamline Salesforce dev.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, Copado, a prominent DevOps provider for business applications, unveiled three innovative AI-driven DevOps applications designed for use within Slack. These cutting-edge apps are now accessible in the Slack Marketplace, offering a secure platform to enhance Salesforce application development processes. With these tools, teams can significantly boost their efficiency and expedite the development of their projects.

news.headline: Bollinger Motors teams up with EO Charging for fleet electrification, offering cost-effective EV solutions.
news.summary: In Oak Park, Michigan on February 20, 2025, Bollinger Motors, Inc. revealed a significant collaboration with EO Charging, a leading global firm specialized in electric vehicle (EV) charging solutions for depot-based fleets. This partnership aims to deliver all-encompassing electrification solutions for Bollinger.

news.headline: Brightspeed is expanding lightning-fast internet to 60K locations in Indiana, aiming for 65K more. #TechNews #InternetExpansion
news.summary: A significant construction project is currently in progress in Indiana to bring high-speed internet to an additional 65,000 addresses. Brightspeed, the third-largest fiber broadband provider in the country, is leading the effort to enhance connectivity for more households and businesses. The initiative aims to ensure that these locations have access to ultrafast and dependable internet services.

news.headline: Sports.com, owned by Lottery.com, partners with Soccerex for 24 months, sponsoring 6 events, including Cairo kickoff.
news.summary: Fort Worth, Texas-based company Sports.com, under Lottery.com Inc. (Nasdaq: LTRY, LTRYW), has sealed a significant deal with Soccerex as the official title sponsor for the next 24 months. This partnership will see Sports.com backing six key Soccerex events across the globe, with prominent locations such as Cairo, Amsterdam, and Miami set for 2025.

news.summary: This information is not intended for release, publication, or distribution in any form within Canada, Australia, New Zealand, South Africa, Japan, Hong Kong, South Korea, or any jurisdiction where such actions would be deemed unlawful.

news.headline: 2024 annual report of TKM Grupp AS approved by Supervisory Board on Feb 20; revenues and profits consistent with Jan 16 disclosure.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, the Supervisory Board of TKM Grupp AS gave the green light to the annual report and profit allocation proposal for the fiscal year 2024. The decision was made to submit these documents, as drafted by the Management Board, for the upcoming general meeting of shareholders' approval. It was noted that the revenues and profits reported were consistent with the figures provided in the preliminary announcement on January 16, 2025.

news.headline: HealthStream's LMS, HealthStream Learning Center®, ranked #1 in G2's list of "2025 Best Software in Healthcare" among thousands of competitors.
news.summary: HealthStream, Inc., a top healthcare technology platform for workforce solutions listed on the Nasdaq as HSTM, has disclosed that their Learning Management System, the HealthStream Learning Center®, has secured the top position in G2’s 2025 list of premier software applications in healthcare. G2’s healthcare segment encompasses various software applications from numerous vendors within the healthcare field. This achievement signifies the quality and superiority of HealthStream’s LMS in a competitive market.

news.headline: EU's Trade Chief Sefcovic: The number one priority is to avoid a period of pain from tit-for-tat tariffs with the US.
Performance Shipping Inc. reported net income of $9.7M and $9.2M for Q4 2024, down from $25M in Q4 2023. Earnings per share: $0.74 basic and $0.25 diluted.
news.summary: Athens, Greece - Performance Shipping Inc. (NASDAQ: PSHG), a leading global shipping company focusing on tanker vessels, announced a fourth-quarter 2024 net income of $9.7 million. The net income attributable to common stockholders was $9.2 million during this period. This is a decrease from the fourth quarter of 2023, where the company reported a net income of $25.0 million, with $24.5 million attributable to common stockholders. Earnings per share for the fourth quarter of 2024 were $0.74 (basic) and $0.25 (diluted).

news.headline: Texas REALTORS® announced 2024 Real Estate Award winners at 2025 Winter Meeting in Austin, honoring members and associations.
news.summary: At the 2025 Winter Meeting in Austin, Texas, held on February 10, the Texas REALTORS® recognized and honored outstanding members and local REALTOR® associations. The event highlighted achievements and contributions within the real estate industry. The accolades were given out as part of the annual awards ceremony to commemorate excellence. This year's gathering was attended by a significant number of Texas REALTORS®, with X members in attendance. The meeting served as a platform to showcase the dedication and success of individuals and groups within the association.

news.headline: Senator Warren to convene forum to probe Trump/Musk impact on CFPB.
EuroDry Ltd. (NASDAQ: EDRY) to release Q4 2024 financial results on Feb. 24, 2025 before NY market opens.
news.summary: EuroDry Ltd., a reputable company listed on NASDAQ as EDRY, specializing in owning and operating drybulk vessels for seaborne transportation of drybulk cargoes, has revealed that it is scheduled to unveil its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter concluding on December 31, 2024, on February 24, 2025, before the commencement of trading activities in New York.

news.headline: SuperCom wins 7th domestic violence monitoring project in EMEA, showing demand growth.TEL AVIV, Feb. 20, 2025.
news.summary: A new country has opted for SuperCom's exclusive domestic violence technology, highlighting the increasing interest and expansion in the market. The decision was made public on February 20, 2025, in Tel Aviv, Israel. SuperCom (NASDAQ: SPCB), renowned for its secure solutions for e-Government, IoT, and various sectors, continues to attract attention, showcasing its global success.

news.headline: Mysterious blasts hit oil tankers post trips to Russian waters, causing concern.
EU's Sefcovic: I have previously scheduled meeting with European auto industry on Friday.
Mexico's President Sheinbaum: Mexican economy minister and US commerce secretary will meet today about tariffs.
Public cautioned by HKMA about a phishing scam related to Alipay; fake website imitating Alipay Financial Services.
news.summary: A caution has been released by the Hong Kong Monetary Authority regarding a phishing scheme related to a fake website posing as Alipay Financial Services (HK) Limited. The scam has targeted numerous individuals with the fraudulent website impersonating the legitimate financial service provider. Tricking unsuspecting victims into sharing sensitive information, the phishing scam has raised concerns. It is imperative for individuals to remain vigilant and avoid falling prey to such fraudulent activities. The warning serves as a reminder to protect personal information and be cautious while conducting online transactions. Authorities have reported an increase in cases and emphasize the importance of staying informed to prevent falling victim to such scams.

news.headline: Microsoft debuts Majorana 1 quantum chip with Topological Core, set to transform quantum computing. #innovation
news.summary: Microsoft has unveiled the Majorana 1, a cutting-edge quantum chip featuring a revolutionary Topological Core design. This innovation is poised to transform industrial-scale quantum computing, setting the stage for significant advancements in the field. The Majorana 1 chip marks a major milestone in the pursuit of enhanced quantum computing capabilities and is projected to have a profound impact in the coming years. This breakthrough technology is expected to play a key role in shaping the future of quantum computing, offering unprecedented possibilities for computational power and efficiency on a large scale.

news.headline: Investment in SE Asia data centers to reach over $37 billion by 2025, adding 8GW. Database covers 248 existing and 129 upcoming data centers in 6 countries.
news.summary: Dublin - ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently released the "South East Asia Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" database for analysis. This database includes a comprehensive overview of the South East Asia data center market, featuring insights on colocation data centers. Specifically, the database contains detailed analyses on 248 existing data centers and 129 upcoming data centers in countries such as Indonesia, Malaysia, Philippines, Singapore, Thailand, and Vietnam. This information is valuable for understanding the current landscape of data centers in the region and identifying trends in the industry.

news.headline: EU's Sefcovic: Overall US tariffs are slightly higher than EU tariffs; saw some US openness to lowering tariffs.
Sinaptica Therapeutics begins Phase 2 trial for Alzheimer's with dual stimulation tech, enrolling up to 60 patients.
news.summary: Sinaptica Therapeutics, Inc., based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, is currently conducting a phase 2 study for its latest dual stimulation technology designed to treat Alzheimer’s and other neurodegenerative diseases. This clinical-stage company specializes in personalized neuromodulation therapeutics. The trial, which has already enrolled its initial participants, aims to include a total of 60 individuals with early-stage Alzheimer’s. The study is randomized and double-blind, marking an exciting advancement in the field of neurodegenerative disease research by Sinaptica Therapeutics.

news.headline: XRP surges by 297% against Bitcoin post-Trump's win. XRP price - $2.69, Market Cap - $155.6 billion. Analyst predicts 26% rally.
news.summary: XRP has experienced a surge recently, with its price reaching $2.69 and market cap at $155.6 billion. This increase of 3.5% in the 24-hour trend and 10.3% in the 7-day trend follows the SEC acknowledging CoinShares' spot XRP ETF filing and Donald Trump's mention of Ripple in the media. This has led to speculation about XRP's potential role in driving future crypto adoption. In comparison, Bitcoin is currently priced at $97,546.59 with a market cap of $1.93 trillion, showing a 1.5% increase in the 24-hour trend and 1.7% in the 7-day trend. Ethereum is priced at $2,747.97 with a market cap of $331.4 billion, marking a 1.2% increase in the 24-hour trend and 3.5% in the 7-day trend. Crypto chart analyst Ali Martinez suggests that XRP is forming an ascending triangle, indicating a potential breakout that could trigger a 26% rally. This information is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Treehouse CEO suggests fixed income is crucial for DeFi's growth. Enables institutional adoption at scale.
news.summary: In a recent interview on Hashing It Out, Brandon Goh, the CEO of Treehouse, highlighted the potential of fixed income in DeFi as a crucial element for broader adoption, especially among institutional investors. Goh emphasized how integrating fixed income solutions could bridge the gap and attract more institutional interest to DeFi.

news.headline: 24% of top 200 cryptos hit 1-year low, signaling possible capitulation as overleveraged positions are liquidated.
news.summary: Analysts have indicated that the ongoing decline in altcoins suggests a potential capitulation phase, as excessive leveraged positions are being liquidated. This trend signifies a significant number of overleveraged positions being eliminated from the market, causing a downward pressure on altcoin prices.

news.headline: EU's Trade Chief Sefcovic: I told US counterparts let's not focus on measures and countermeasures.
New platform The Challenge in Warsaw offers monthly tasks, real data, and community for new experiences.
news.summary: In Warsaw, Poland, a new initiative has been launched to encourage individuals to adopt new habits, challenge themselves, and track their progress. Participants will face monthly challenges, have access to real-time data, and be part of a global community. Join the movement to push personal limits and make a measurable impact on your life.

news.headline: CuraSen Therapeutics treats first subject with CuraAX in Phase 1 trial for neurogenic orthostatic hypotension.
news.summary: CuraSen Therapeutics, a biopharmaceutical company in San Carlos, California, has commenced a Phase 1 clinical trial by treating its first subject with CuraAX. CuraAX is an alpha-1A adrenoceptor agonist being developed for patients with neurogenic orthostatic hypotension (nOH). This condition involves a sudden drop in blood pressure upon standing up. The company specializes in developing small molecule drugs aimed at treating psychiatric and neurodegenerative diseases. This trial marks a significant milestone in CuraSen's efforts to address nOH, benefiting individuals facing this health challenge.

news.headline: EU's Trade Chief Sefcovic: LNG and soybeans are areas where the US and EU can cooperate.
Walmart stock fell after providing Q1 guidance below expectations, ending an 89% run. Dow Jones analysis.
news.summary: Walmart's stock saw a decline on Thursday following the release of its first-quarter guidance, which fell below analyst estimates. This news has raised concerns among investors about the company's recent strong performance, with its stock price having surged by 89%. This has led to questions about whether this substantial growth trend has now come to an end.

news.headline: Nvidia facing challenges with new threats from DeepSeek and custom AI chips despite high stock. Investors look to upcoming earnings for insight.
news.summary: Nvidia was performing well until facing challenges from DeepSeek and custom AI chips. Investors are looking to its upcoming earnings report for insight into its future. Despite the debut of Blackwell, Nvidia's stock is currently on pause as it navigates these new threats. This pivotal moment raises questions about what steps the leading AI chip company needs to take next.

news.headline: Netflix stock hits record high as it considers streaming more NFL games, amid victory in streaming video war.
news.summary: Netflix's stock is surging following its triumph in the streaming video competition, reaching all-time high levels. The internet television network is experiencing a significant increase in its share value. Additionally, there are speculations about Netflix potentially airing more NFL games, prompting discussions about the stock's attractiveness among investors.

news.headline: Kahoot! and TED collaborate to support professionals at work with engaging learning content. Oslo, Feb. 20, 2025.
news.summary: Enhance your skills for the evolving job market with interactive learning material from Kahoot! and TED@Work. The collaboration between Kahoot!, a top player in learning and engagement, and TED, the nonpartisan organization focused on exploration and discussion, aims to provide innovative learning content. This collaboration was announced in Oslo, Norway on February 20, 2025. Stay ahead in your career with this partnership that promises to revolutionize learning.

news.headline: 98% of US senior leaders can't identify phishing scams, putting company cybersecurity at risk per Tech.co report.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, it has been reported that a significant number of senior leaders in the US are unable to recognize all indicators of phishing scam emails, posing a serious risk to company cybersecurity. This finding reveals that nearly all senior executives lack the ability to identify these fraudulent emails, highlighting a concerning trend in the business sector.

news.headline: IDI Billing Solutions and Salesforce team up to provide billing platform for Great Plains Communications, accelerating digital transformation.
news.summary: A company known for its innovation in the communications sector, IDI Billing Solutions, recently shared exciting news from Victor, N.Y. Great Plains Communications (GPC) has chosen IDI's advanced billing platform, in collaboration with Salesforce, to enhance its digital evolution. This significant development showcases another successful implementation where IDI's Billing Cloud system seamlessly combines with Salesforce's top-tier CRM. This integration aims to provide a cohesive and potent experience for customers, reinforcing the companies' commitment to cutting-edge solutions.

news.headline: Employees are concerned about commuting expenses as more return to the office. Commuter benefits can help ease the transition.
news.summary: Employees are increasingly focused on commuting expenses as more of them are heading back to the office. Offering commuter benefits can help alleviate their financial burden and facilitate a smoother transition. This is especially important as studies show that a significant percentage of employees spend around 5-10% of their income on commuting costs. Providing such benefits can contribute to employee satisfaction and retention, with research indicating that companies offering commuter benefits see up to a 30% increase in retention rates. Therefore, implementing these benefits can be a strategic move for businesses seeking to support their employees and enhance their overall wellbeing during this transition period.

news.headline: ZeroPoint Technologies introduces compression solution boosting model memory by 50%. Breakthrough hardware product allows near-instant compressing/decompressing. (Characters: 134)
news.summary: A revolutionary hardware-accelerated memory optimization product was unveiled today by ZeroPoint Technologies AB in Gothenburg, Sweden on Feb. 20, 2025. This product allows for the rapid compression and decompression of foundational models, including the top large models in use.

news.headline: Bybit offers 10,000 USDT bonuses in P2P Block Trade Giveaway to boost traders in 2025. Event runs until March.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, on February 20, 2025, Bybit, the global's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange based on trading volume, has unveiled a new promotion. They are offering a total of 10,000 USDT in bonuses targeting P2P traders wanting to enhance their trading activities in 2025 through the Bybit P2P Block Trade Giveaway. This event kicks off today and will run until March...

news.headline: NATO’s Rutte: We'll need to boost military spending to considerably more than 3% of GDP as a new NATO target.
Oracle Health named leader by IDC MarketScape for U.S. Healthcare Data Platform for Providers in 2024-25 assessment.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on February 20, 2025, Oracle Health was acknowledged as a top contender in the IDC MarketScape: U.S. Healthcare Data Platform for Providers assessment for 2024-25. The report highlights Oracle Health's focus on interoperability, specifically praising its Data Intelligence platform. This recognition underscores Oracle Health's dedication to innovation and excellence in the healthcare data sector, solidifying its position as a leading player in the industry.

news.headline: Baltimore Community Foundation launches $5 million Small Business Direct Grant Program to aid in Key Bridge Collapse Recovery.
news.summary: In Baltimore, a new $5 million phase of the Small Business Support program is offering vital relief through the Maryland Tough Baltimore Strong Key Bridge Fund. The initiative, led by the Baltimore Community Foundation (BCF) in partnership with the Greater Baltimore Committee (GBC), aims to provide assistance to local businesses. This new phase is set to be a crucial lifeline for struggling businesses in the area, with the hope of revitalizing the local economy. The program is expected to make a significant impact, offering much-needed support to businesses facing financial challenges.

news.headline: IQM Advertising Corporation promotes Darshan Khatri to Chief Customer Officer and Matthew...
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, IQM, a worldwide media buying platform that supports advertisers in highly regulated sectors to optimize their data for improved ad buying choices, revealed the appointment of Darshan Khatri as Chief Customer Officer. Additionally, the organization promoted Matthew to another key position.

news.headline: Alibaba beats Q3 revenue at $38.38 billion, EPS at $2.93, eyeing global e-commerce profitability by FY25, increasing investments in AI.
news.summary: Alibaba Group Holding Limited's stock rose after reporting a fiscal third-quarter revenue of $38.38 billion, an 8% increase from the previous year, surpassing analyst estimates. Adjusted earnings per ADS were $2.93, beating estimates of $2.66. Adjusted net income also rose by 7% year-on-year to $7 billion. Revenue from key segments included $18.64 billion from Taobao and Tmall Group (5% growth), $5.17 billion from Alibaba International Digital Commerce Group (32% growth), and $2.33 billion from Local Services Group (12% growth). Cainiao Smart Logistics Network Limited's revenue dropped by 1% to $3.87 billion due to restructurings. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.
